text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 An Israeli cabinet source told Kan News that Lebanon must remove Hezbollah ministers from the government as a confidence-building step. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报突发 🔴 一位以色列内阁消息人士告诉Kan新闻，黎巴嫩必须将真主党部长从政府中撤出，作为建立信任的步骤。推文

text: Open Source Intel Hezbollah-affiliated networks and their media operatives spent time pushing that Iran forced Israel to the table, that Hezbollah had a seat in the ceasefire, that they had won something. Israel hinted at it, Pakistan and Iran said Hezbollah was part of the ceasefire. Their men believed it. Some let their guard down (some are reporting there was a virtual meeting.) Over 300 eliminated in a single operation. 100 targets in 10 minutes. One of the most devastating targeted strikes in the organization’s history. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报与真主党有关的网络及其媒体人员花时间宣扬伊朗迫使以色列坐到谈判桌前，真主党在停火协议中占有一席之地，他们赢得了一些东西。以色列对此进行了暗示，巴基斯坦和伊朗称真主党是停火协议的一部分。他们的人相信了这一点。有些人放松了警惕（有人报告说举行了一次虚拟会议）。在一次行动中消灭了300多人。10分钟内打击了100个目标。这是该组织历史上最具破坏性的定点清除行动之一。推文

text: OSINTtechnical Israel's IDF assesses that Iran is already working to rebuild its ballistic missile force. tweet
text_zh: OSINTtechnical 以色列国防军评估称，伊朗已经在努力重建其弹道导弹部队。推文

text: Open Source Intel Iran's Parliament Speaker, Ghalibaf: Past experiences have shown us that we must have absolute distrust toward the enemy. America’s historic retreat and acceptance of the general framework of Iran’s 10-point plan is an undeniable victory, but we consider it an incomplete step. If the United States stops violating its commitments, negotiations may be possible." tweet
text_zh: 开源情报伊朗议会议长卡利巴夫：过去的经验告诉我们，我们必须对敌人保持绝对的不信任。美国的历史性退却和接受伊朗10点计划的总框架是一个不可否认的胜利，但我们认为这是一个不完整的步骤。如果美国停止违反其承诺，谈判或许是可能的。推文

text: WarTranslated Russia's budget deficit continues to grow and has further exceeded the annual plan. According to the Russian Ministry of Finance, the federal budget deficit for January-March 2026 reached 4.58 trillion rubles. This is more than the amount planned for the entire year (3.79 trillion) and exceeds the figure for the same period last year by 2.62 trillion. At the same time, there are reasons to believe that these figures are understated, as the Russian Treasury previously reported a deficit of 5.57 trillion rubles already for the first two months. tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 俄罗斯的预算赤字持续增长，并已进一步超过年度计划。据俄罗斯财政部称，2026年1月至3月的联邦预算赤字达到4.58万亿卢布。这超过了全年计划的金额（3.79万亿），并比去年同期的数据高出2.62万亿。同时，有理由相信这些数字被低估了，因为俄罗斯财政部此前报告称，仅前两个月的赤字就已经达到5.57万亿卢布。推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese health officials say the death toll from a series of intense Israeli strikes yesterday has surpassed 300. Israel targeted Hezbollah commanders and operatives in 100 different locations. Lebanon’s Health Ministry reports at least 182 kiIIed and 890 wounded in Israeli strikes against Hezbollah nationwide yesterday. This marks the largest blow to Hezbollah since the pager attack, with dozens of commanders, senior figures, and operatives eliminated in a major hit to the group. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: 开源情报黎巴嫩卫生官员表示，昨天一系列激烈的以色列空袭造成的死亡人数已超过300人。以色列在100个不同地点针对真主党指挥官和行动人员进行了打击。黎巴嫩卫生部报告称，昨天以色列针对全国真主党的袭击造成至少182人死亡，890人受伤。这是自寻呼机袭击以来对真主党的最大打击，数十名指挥官、高级人物和行动人员被消灭，这对该组织造成了重大打击。 - 开源情报推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese President Joseph Aoun called for a ceasefire with Israel as the only way forward, followed by direct talks. “I have conducted, and continue to conduct, intense international contacts in this regard,” he said, just before Netanyahu announced negotiations with Lebanon. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042294471358816351/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩呼吁与以色列停火，称这是唯一的出路，随后应进行直接会谈。就在内塔尼亚胡宣布与黎巴嫩进行谈判之前，他说：“我已进行并将继续进行密集的国际接触。” https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042294471358816351/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel Al Mayadeen reports that Iran came within minutes of launching missiles at Israel last night, but Pakistan stepped in to prevent it. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：据“广场电视台”（Al Mayadeen）报道，伊朗昨晚距离向以色列发射导弹仅差几分钟，但巴基斯坦介入阻止了此事。推文

text: OSINTdefender Following the announcement by UK Defense Secretary John Healey of Russian undersea operations near the UK’s undersea critical infrastructure, the UK Ministry of Defense also announced that, alongside other NATO partners, they shadowed two Russian shadow fleet vessels that were being escorted by the Russian frigate Admiral Grigorovich through the English Channel. The story was first reported by the Telegraph. tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender：继英国国防大臣约翰·希利宣布俄罗斯在英国海底关键基础设施附近进行水下行动后，英国国防部也宣布，他们与其他北约伙伴一道，跟踪了两艘由俄罗斯“格里戈罗维奇海军上将”号护卫舰护送通过英吉利海峡的俄罗斯影子船队船只。该消息最初由《每日电讯报》报道。推文

text: WarTranslated A wonderful briefing from Russian intelligence. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042293704061235653/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated：一份来自俄罗斯情报部门的精彩简报。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2042293704061235653/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel JUST IN 🔴 Hezbollah MP declares the group will not accept any direct Lebanon-Israel negotiations. tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：突发 🔴 真主党议员宣布该组织不会接受任何黎巴嫩与以色列的直接谈判。推文

text: Open Source Intel Trump tells NBC he’s “very optimistic” on a potential Iran deal, calling its leaders “much more reasonable” in private meetings than in public, as VP JD Vance leads U.S. talks in Pakistan. https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042292881671483836/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: 开源情报：特朗普告诉美国全国广播公司（NBC），他对潜在的伊朗协议“非常乐观”，称其领导人在私下会晤中比在公开场合“理智得多”，与此同时，副总统万斯正在巴基斯坦主导美国方面的会谈。https://twitter.com/Osint613/status/2042292881671483836/photo/1 推文

text: Open Source Intel U.S. pressure, along with UAE condemnation of the Beirut strikes, has pushed Israel toward direct talks with Lebanon. - Kann News. Senior Israeli official: We are open to negotiations, but it will be conducted under fire. The Lebanese government needs to prove that it is capable of succeeding where it has already failed. - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 美国施压，加上阿联酋对贝鲁特空袭的谴责，已推动以色列与黎巴嫩进行直接谈判。——Kann News。以色列高级官员：我们对谈判持开放态度，但谈判将在炮火下进行。黎巴嫩政府需要证明它有能力在之前失败的地方取得成功。——Open Source Intel 推文

text: Disclose.tv JUST IN - UK awards £380 million in funding to Agratas, the battery arm of India's Tata ​Group, to support the building of an ​EV battery gigafactory in Somerset and UK's transition to zero-emission vehicles. https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042291784454144211/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Disclose.tv 快讯——英国向印度塔塔集团旗下的电池部门 Agratas 拨款 3.8 亿英镑，以支持其在萨默塞特建设电动汽车电池超级工厂，并助力英国向零排放汽车转型。https://twitter.com/disclosetv/status/2042291784454144211/photo/1 推文

text: WarTranslated "Putin will not stop if he gets Donbas; his next move will be to seize the regional centers - Dnipro and Kharkiv. We have to acknowledge that some Americans believe Donbas means nothing to us. They refuse to recognize that Putin will lie to them and that he could continue the occupation even after such steps." - Zelenskyy on Alastair Campbell's podcast. https://linktr.ee/restispolitics tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated “如果普京拿下了顿巴斯，他不会就此罢手；他的下一步将是夺取区域中心——第聂伯罗和哈尔科夫。我们必须承认，一些美国人认为顿巴斯对我们毫无意义。他们拒绝承认普京会欺骗他们，也拒绝承认即使在采取这些步骤后，他仍可能继续占领。”——泽连斯基在 Alastair Campbell 的播客中说道。https://linktr.ee/restispolitics 推文

text: Nuno Felix I would like to report a murder…. https://twitter.com/Felix_Nuno/status/2042290777041121378/photo/1 I've lost track of all the reinventions, from Daily Worker-peddling commie to neocon to Never Trumper to liberal to Catholic tradcon to whatever the hell he is now. As best I can tell, his next move will either be to transition or join the IRGC. Maybe both given the new Supreme Leader. - Michael Weiss tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 我想举报一起谋杀案…… https://twitter.com/Felix_Nuno/status/2042290777041121378/photo/1 我已经记不清他所有的转型了，从兜售《每日工人报》的共产主义者到新保守主义者，再到反特朗普派、自由派、天主教传统主义者，以及现在他到底是什么鬼东西。据我所知，他的下一步要么是变性，要么是加入伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）。考虑到新的最高领袖，也许两者兼而有之。——Michael Weiss 推文

text: Open Source Intel First non-Iranian tanker transits the Strait of Hormuz since the ceasefire, MarineTraffic data shows. tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel MarineTraffic 数据显示，停火以来首艘非伊朗油轮通过霍尔木兹海峡。推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : I've lost track of all the reinventions, from Daily Worker-peddling commie to neocon to Never Trumper to liberal to Catholic tradcon to whatever the hell he is now. As best I can tell, his next move will either be to transition or join the IRGC. Maybe both given the new Supreme Leader. What a journey for Sohrab. He made a name for himself in 2019 by claiming nearly everything bad with conservatism was personified by David French but that Donald Trump was leading America (in Sohrab’s words) “toward order, continuity, and social cohesion.” - Jonah Goldberg tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss：我已经记不清他所有的转型了，从兜售《每日工人报》的共产主义者到新保守主义者，再到反特朗普派、自由派、天主教传统主义者，以及现在他到底是什么鬼东西。据我所知，他的下一步要么是变性，要么是加入伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队（IRGC）。考虑到新的最高领袖，也许两者兼而有之。Sohrab 的旅程真是精彩。他在 2019 年声称保守主义的所有弊病都体现在大卫·弗伦奇（David French）身上，但唐纳德·特朗普（用 Sohrab 的话来说）正在引领美国“走向秩序、连续性和社会凝聚力”，以此成名。——Jonah Goldberg 推文

text: OSINTdefender RT @DefenseBulletin : It’s yet unclear whether or not NATO member states plan on making any commitments to a Strait of Hormuz security framework, but a number of nations, including France, have directly spoken to Iranian decision-makers on the nature of a post-conflict framework, seemingly bypassing any potential U.S. initiative. According to Reuters, citing three European diplomats, NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte has told his counterparts in NATO member states that U.S. President Donald J. Trump is looking for commitments to a Strait of Hormuz framework within days. One diplomat said “We note the frustration in Washington, but they did not consult allies either before or after starting this war.” - OSINTdefender tweet
text_zh: OSINTdefender 转发 @DefenseBulletin : 目前尚不清楚北约成员国是否计划对霍尔木兹海峡安全框架做出任何承诺，但包括法国在内的多个国家已直接与伊朗决策者讨论了冲突后框架的性质，似乎绕过了美国可能采取的任何倡议。据路透社援引三位欧洲外交官的话称，北约秘书长马克·吕特已告知北约成员国同行，美国总统唐纳德·J·特朗普正在寻求在几天内就霍尔木兹海峡框架做出承诺。一位外交官表示：“我们注意到了华盛顿的挫败感，但他们在发动这场战争之前或之后都没有咨询盟友。” - OSINTdefender 推文

text: Open Source Intel Lebanese reports say Beirut has received no U.S. invitation for talks, adding the issue is limited to Netanyahu’s announcement. BREAKING 🔴 PM Netanyahu: “In light of Lebanon's repeated calls to open direct negotiations with Israel, I instructed the Cabinet yesterday to open direct negotiations with Lebanon as soon as possible.” - Open Source Intel tweet
text_zh: Open Source Intel 黎巴嫩方面的报道称，贝鲁特尚未收到美国的会谈邀请，并补充说该问题仅限于内塔尼亚胡的声明。突发 🔴 总理内塔尼亚胡：“鉴于黎巴嫩多次呼吁与以色列开启直接谈判，我昨天指示内阁尽快与黎巴嫩开启直接谈判。” - Open Source Intel 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei declared that the Iranian nation has achieved a decisive victory in the “third imposed war” against the U.S. and Israel, marking the 40th day since the death of his father, Ali Khamenei. He said…" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei said 12 million Iranians have joined the general mobilisation. He stressed that even with ceasefire talks, public presence on the streets must continue and is a crucial weapon. He called for unity and patience with wartime shortages, and vowed that the nation will avenge the blood of the late leader and all "martyrs" of the war. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇮🇱 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊宣布，伊朗民族在针对美国和以色列的“第三次强加战争”中取得了决定性胜利，这标志着其父亲阿里·哈梅内伊逝世40周年。他说……" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉赛义德·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊表示，1200万伊朗人已加入总动员。他强调，即使在停火谈判期间，公众在街头的存在也必须持续，这是一种至关重要的武器。他呼吁团结并对战时短缺保持耐心，并誓言国家将为已故领袖和战争中所有“烈士”的鲜血复仇。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Israeli drone activity over Dahieh. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 以色列无人机在达希耶上空活动。 @wfwitness

text: Ayatollah Khamenei: Presence of people on the streets must continue like the past 40 days.
text_zh: 阿亚图拉哈梅内伊：民众在街头的存在必须像过去40天一样持续下去。

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 🇮🇷 Politico: A previously undisclosed 2020 U.S. intelligence memo outlined how the Venezuelan Defence Ministry allocated funds from the budget to purchase an Iranian ballistic missile system estimated at around $400 million, but backed down from the initiative after significant U.S pressure. A memo dated January 17th outlined that Venezuelan Defence Minister Padrino Lopez had approved of the purchase and that payments would be funnelled through state owned companies. The system would have been operated from platforms on naval vessels. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇻🇪 🇮🇷 Politico：一份此前未披露的2020年美国情报备忘录概述了委内瑞拉国防部如何从预算中拨款购买价值约4亿美元的伊朗弹道导弹系统，但在美国施加巨大压力后放弃了该计划。一份日期为1月17日的备忘录概述了委内瑞拉国防部长帕德里诺·洛佩斯已批准该采购，且款项将通过国有企业进行汇转。该系统本将从海军舰艇的平台上进行操作。 @wfwitness

text: Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: We will enter a new phase in the management of the Strait of Hormuz.
text_zh: 伊朗新任最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：我们将进入霍尔木兹海峡管理的新阶段。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 Iranian Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei declared that the Iranian nation has achieved a decisive victory in the “third imposed war” against the U.S. and Israel, marking the 40th day since the death of his father, Ali Khamenei. He said Iran will demand full compensation for all damages, blood money for the dead, and will introduce a new phase of management over the Strait of Hormuz. He warned Gulf neighbours to witness the miracle of Iran’s resilience, abandon arrogance, and stop trusting false promises of the enemies. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 🇮🇱 伊朗最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊宣布，伊朗民族在针对美国和以色列的“第三次强加战争”中取得了决定性胜利。此时正值其父阿里·哈梅内伊逝世40天。他表示，伊朗将要求赔偿所有损失，索要死者的血债，并将对霍尔木兹海峡实施新的管理阶段。他警告海湾邻国要见证伊朗韧性的奇迹，放弃傲慢，停止相信敌人的虚假承诺。@wfwitness

text: Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: To our southern neighbors: you are witnessing a miracle — see it correctly and stand in the right place. Be suspicious of the false promises of devils.
text_zh: 伊朗新任最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：致我们的南方邻国：你们正在见证一个奇迹——请正确看待它并站在正确的位置。要对恶魔的虚假承诺保持怀疑。

text: Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: We will not abandon the criminal aggressors who attacked our country. We will demand compensation for every single damage and the blood price of our martyrs.
text_zh: 伊朗新任最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：我们不会放过那些袭击我们国家的犯罪侵略者。我们将要求赔偿每一项损失，并索要我们烈士的血债。

text: NEW: Iran's new Supreme Leader Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei: You, the heroic nation of Iran, have been the decisive victors of this battlefield. Iran today stands at the dawn of becoming a great power.
text_zh: 快讯：伊朗新任最高领袖阿亚图拉·穆杰塔巴·哈梅内伊：你们，伊朗的英雄民族，是这场战场上的决定性胜利者。今天的伊朗正站在成为大国的黎明时刻。

text: 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Pakistan’s Minister of Defense: Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell.
text_zh: 🇵🇰 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 巴基斯坦国防部长：以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒。当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩却正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民正被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件持续不断。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上制造了这个毒瘤国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人下地狱。

text: Reza Pahlavi: The United Kingdom has endlessly appeased the criminal regime in Iran... The Iranian people will remember who stood with them in their hour of need and who stood against them.
text_zh: 礼萨·巴列维：英国一直在无休止地安抚伊朗的犯罪政权……伊朗人民会记住在他们危难时刻谁与他们站在一起，谁又站在了他们的对立面。

text: Hundreds of Venezuelan public sector workers and pensioners marched in Caracas to demand higher wages and pension increases amid severe inflation and “hunger-level” pay. Security forces used tear gas and crowd control to disperse demonstrators near key government sites.
text_zh: 数百名委内瑞拉公共部门工人和退休人员在加拉加斯游行，要求在严重的通货膨胀和“饥饿水平”的工资下提高工资和养老金。安全部队在关键政府地点附近使用催泪瓦斯和人群控制手段驱散示威者。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan : Israel believes that an agreement with Lebanon can be reached before Israels October elections. A cabinet source said Lebanon will be forced to dismiss Hezbollah ministers as a confidence‑building measure. Negotiations will be conducted under fire and focus on border issues. After the Israeli Air Force’s “Eternal Darkness” strikes in Beirut, the U.S. demanded Israel minimise operations in Lebanon. The UAE also criticised the attacks. Israel decided to open direct talks with Lebanon, hosted by the U.S. State Department next week, with the Israeli and Lebanese ambassadors and the US ambassador to Lebanon participating. Former Israeli minister of strategic affairs Ron Dermer will also be involved. Strikes against Hezbollah will continue until understandings are reached on disarming the group and securing the north. A ceasefire will only happen if Hezbollah stops firing. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇺🇸 Kan：以色列认为可以在以色列10月大选前与黎巴嫩达成协议。一位内阁消息人士称，黎巴嫩将被迫解雇真主党部长作为建立信任的措施。谈判将在炮火下进行，重点是边界问题。在以色列空军对贝鲁特进行“永恒黑暗”打击后，美国要求以色列减少在黎巴嫩的行动。阿联酋也批评了这些袭击。以色列决定与黎巴嫩开启直接对话，由美国国务院下周主办，以色列和黎巴嫩大使以及美国驻黎巴嫩大使将参加。前以色列战略事务部长罗恩·德尔默也将参与其中。针对真主党的打击将持续到就解除该组织武装和确保北部安全达成谅解为止。只有真主党停止开火，才会实现停火。@wfwitness

text: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich: There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Gaza that will expand our borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Lebanon that will expand our borders, to the Litani [river], to defensible borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Syria... the crown, the Hermon, and the Hauran at least...
text_zh: 以色列财政部长比撒列·斯莫特里赫：加沙将有一个最终的外交阶段，这将扩大我们的边界。黎巴嫩将有一个最终的外交阶段，这将把我们的边界扩大到利塔尼河，达到可防御的边界。叙利亚将有一个最终的外交阶段……至少是王冠、赫尔蒙山和豪兰地区……

text: — ❗️ 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇱 Pakistan’s Minister of Defense: ‘Israel is evil and a curse for humanity, while peace talks are underway in Islamabad, genocide is being committed in Lebanon. Innocent citizens are being killed by Israel, first Gaza, then Iran and now Lebanon, bloodletting continues unabated. I hope and pray people who created this cancerous state on Palestinian land to get rid of European jews burn in hell.’ @Middle_East_Spectator
text_zh: — ❗️ 🇵🇰 / 🇮🇱 巴基斯坦国防部长：‘以色列是邪恶的，是人类的诅咒。当伊斯兰堡正在进行和平谈判时，黎巴嫩正在发生种族灭绝。无辜的公民正在被以色列杀害，先是加沙，然后是伊朗，现在是黎巴嫩，流血事件仍在持续。我希望并祈祷那些在巴勒斯坦土地上建立这个毒瘤国家以摆脱欧洲犹太人的人下地狱。’ @Middle_East_Spectator

text: Iran's Ghalibaf: Past experiences have shown us that we must have absolute distrust toward the enemy. America’s historic retreat and acceptance of the general framework of Iran’s 10-point plan is an undeniable victory — but we consider it an incomplete step. If the United States stops violating its commitments, negotiations may be possible.
text_zh: 伊朗卡利巴夫：过去的经验告诉我们，我们必须对敌人保持绝对的不信任。美国历史性的退缩和接受伊朗10点计划的总框架是一个不可否认的胜利——但我们认为这是一个不完整的步骤。如果美国停止违反其承诺，谈判或许是可能的。

text: The U.S. has lost 24 MQ-9 Reaper drones in the Iran conflict (8 since April), totaling about $720 million. Source: CBS
text_zh: 美国在与伊朗的冲突中损失了24架MQ-9“死神”无人机（自4月以来损失了8架），总价值约7.2亿美元。来源：CBS

text: In 2020, Venezuela under Nicolás Maduro approved a plan to spend over $400 million to buy a ballistic missile system from Iran. The missiles could potentially have reached U.S. territory and would have been deployed on Venezuelan naval vessels. The deal ultimately did not go through after pressure from the Trump administration. Source: Politico
text_zh: 2020年，尼古拉斯·马杜罗领导下的委内瑞拉批准了一项计划，斥资超过4亿美元从伊朗购买弹道导弹系统。这些导弹可能触及美国领土，并计划部署在委内瑞拉海军舰艇上。在特朗普政府施压后，该交易最终未能达成。来源：Politico

text: 🇸🇾 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 Hamas called on Palestinians in Jerusalem and the occupied interior to flock to the Al-Aqsa Mosque after its reopening following over 40 days of occupation closure, urging Friday to be a day of renewed loyalty and protection for the mosque against occupation attempts to impose new Judaization realities, affirming that Al-Aqsa remains the title of the struggle. Hamas also mourned the mujahid martyr Alaa Khaled Subaih, who was martyred on Wednesday evening, April 9, 2026, by occupation gunfire while confronting settlers near an illegal outpost close to the village of Tayasir, east of Tubas.
text_zh: 🇸🇾 ⚡️ 🇮🇱 哈马斯呼吁耶路撒冷和被占领内陆地区的巴勒斯坦人在阿克萨清真寺被占领军关闭40多天后重新开放时涌入该寺，敦促将周五定为重申忠诚和保护清真寺的日子，以抵制占领者强加新的犹太化现实的企图，并重申阿克萨清真寺仍是斗争的象征。哈马斯还哀悼了圣战烈士阿拉·哈立德·苏拜赫，他于2026年4月9日周三晚在图巴斯以东泰亚西尔村附近对抗定居者时，遭占领军开枪射击而殉难。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 Israeli Channel 13: U.S. President Trump stated that Israeli Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu supports the current ceasefire with Iran: "Netanyahu supports the deal; he's perfectly fine with it, excellent. We're going to have a very successful agreement; everything is going to work out very well." When asked about Lebanon, Trump commented on Netanyahu's approach: "Netanyahu will be fine. He'll slow things down a bit, lower his profile. He has an issue with Hezbollah. He'll ease off a little, but he's going to be absolutely fine." Regarding another possible visit to Israel, Trump said: "I will come to Israel at some point. I don't yet know whether I will attend the ceremony." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇺🇸 🇱🇧 🇮🇷 以色列第13频道：美国总统特朗普表示，以色列总理本雅明·内塔尼亚胡支持目前与伊朗的停火协议：“内塔尼亚胡支持这项协议；他对此完全没问题，非常好。我们将达成一项非常成功的协议；一切都会进展得非常顺利。”当被问及黎巴嫩问题时，特朗普评论了内塔尼亚胡的做法：“内塔尼亚胡会没事的。他会放慢节奏，降低姿态。他与真主党之间存在问题。他会稍微缓和一下，但他绝对会没事的。”关于是否会再次访问以色列，特朗普说：“我会在某个时候访问以色列。我还不知道是否会参加仪式。” @wfwitness

text: Israeli Finance Minister Bezalel Smotrich: There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Gaza that will expand our borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Lebanon that will expand our borders, to the Litani [river], to defensible borders. There will be a concluding diplomatic leg in Syria... the crown, the Hermon, and the Hauran at least...
text_zh: 以色列财政部长比撒列·斯莫特里赫：加沙将有一个最终的外交阶段，这将扩大我们的边界。黎巴嫩将有一个最终的外交阶段，这将把我们的边界扩大到利塔尼河，达到可防御的边界。叙利亚将有一个最终的外交阶段……至少是皇冠、赫尔蒙山和豪兰地区……

text: ⚡ 🇮🇱 Red alert sirens are sounding in the Confrontation Line region, Northern Israel. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡ 🇮🇱 以色列北部对抗线地区响起红色警报。 @wfwitness

text: Trump says he’s “very optimistic” about a deal with Iran: They’re much more reasonable… they’re agreeing to what they have to. If they don’t make a deal, it’s going to be very painful. I spoke with Bibi. We have to be a little more low-key. Source: NBC
text_zh: 特朗普表示他对与伊朗达成协议“非常乐观”：他们理智多了……他们正在同意他们必须同意的事情。如果他们不达成协议，那将是非常痛苦的。我和比比谈过了。我们必须稍微低调一点。来源：NBC

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 BBC : The United States is planning to automatically register young men for military draft eligibility as early as December, ending decades of self‑registration. The change, approved by Congress in December, would apply to men aged 18‑25. Officials said it would save money and streamline the process, though some have expressed concern it could pave the way for a future draft. The White House has said conscription is not part of current plans. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 BBC：美国计划最早于12月自动为符合征兵资格的年轻男性进行登记，结束几十年来自行登记的做法。这项由国会于12月批准的变更将适用于18至25岁的男性。官员们表示，这将节省资金并简化流程，尽管一些人担心这可能为未来的征兵铺平道路。白宫表示，征兵并不在目前的计划之内。@wfwitness

text: The U.S. has lost 24 MQ-9 Reaper drones in the Iran conflict (8 since April), totaling about $720 million. Source: CBS
text_zh: 美国在伊朗冲突中损失了24架MQ-9“死神”无人机（自4月以来损失了8架），总价值约7.2亿美元。来源：CBS

text: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 Spain will reopen its embassy in Tehran in hopes of helping to achieve peace amid the US-Israeli war on Iran, Foreign Minister Jose Manuel Albares said on Thursday. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇪🇸 🇮🇷 西班牙外交大臣何塞·曼努埃尔·阿尔巴雷斯周四表示，西班牙将重新开放其驻德黑兰大使馆，以期在美以对伊朗战争期间帮助实现和平。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ❗️ In a non-final toll and still counting, from the bloodiest single day in many years if not decades, the death toll in Lebanon from yesterday's 10-minute wave of Jewish bombing on Lebanon is now 300+ Lebanese Ministry of Health: 303 martyrs and 1,150 wounded, a preliminary toll from yesterday's Israeli raids on the country
text_zh: ❗️ 在非最终统计且仍在统计中的情况下，这是多年甚至几十年来最血腥的一天，黎巴嫩卫生部称，昨天犹太人对黎巴嫩进行10分钟轰炸造成的死亡人数现已超过300人：303名烈士和1150人受伤，这是昨天以色列对该国空袭的初步统计结果。

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian said the Iranian nation changed the equation of power over the past 40 days since the death of the Supreme Leader. The ceasefire was the result of imposing Iran’s will on the enemy, which failed to bring the country to its knees. The decision to accept the truce was made with consensus under the leader’s guidance, based on dignity, wisdom and national interest – not weakness – to consolidate battlefield victories. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 伊朗总统马苏德·佩泽希齐扬表示，自最高领袖去世后的过去40天里，伊朗民族改变了权力等式。停火是伊朗将意志强加于敌人的结果，敌人未能使该国屈服。接受停火的决定是在领袖的指导下，基于尊严、智慧和国家利益——而非软弱——经协商一致做出的，旨在巩固战场胜利。 @wfwitness

text: 🇮🇷 FM Araghchi calls out Bibi. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇮🇷 外交部长阿拉格齐公开指责内塔尼亚胡。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
